items.name: Dark Grunge Emo Jester Mask w/ Black Hair (Checker
items.description:
✨ Don’t forget to Like the Item! ✨
More colors available in the group.

Dark Grunge Emo Jester Mask w/ Hair featuring a creepy jester face, smudged grunge makeup, and messy layered hair for a bold alt avatar look. Perfect for emo outfits, horror fits, clown aesthetics, spooky roleplay, gothic styles, Halloween vibes, and edgy street fashion. Designed for players who love dark anime energy, chaotic clown masks, and standout aesthetic characters.

items.name: Seagull Friend
items.description: Click to summon three seagull guardians who fly around you with their watchful seagull eyes.  If an enemy comes 60 studs of your character, the seagulls swoop down and they blast your enemies with powerful beams of water! Each blast does 13 damage per hit.

items.description:
Character owned by BlushCrunch

Check out all my Dandy's World pals: https://www.roblox.com/catalog?Keyword=Dandy&taxonomy=8i1sggNTrxoN799hpRrR1S&CreatorName=PerroWorks&salesTypeFilter=1

Play the game here: https://www.roblox.com/games/16116270224/Dandys-World

If the creator of Dandy's World wants my ítems taken down, please don't hestitate about informing me through the group forum and i'll take them down immediately. Unlike these other groups that are flooding the marketplace with stolen assets and use burner accounts to evade termination, i'm using my main account when publishing, and all my models are made from scratch. I put all of my effort into making sure each one of my items are made with the high quality people deserve, and they're always at the minimum price possible with regional pricing enabled too. Thanks for reading!

items.description:
✨Ancient Chinese Immortal Style Hanfu Gown-Pink

This luxurious hanfu skirt is made with rich, textured brocade fabric. The intricate golden patterns and flowing silhouette bring the grandeur of ancient Chinese nobility to your Avatar. Whether you’re attending a palace banquet or exploring a mystical forest, this skirt will make your character look like a true member of the immortal realm.
